commands.TABLEANALYZE: Captures a selected AutoCAD table at full fidelity and exports a reconstruction-ready JSON file.
commands.LFS: Opens the lighting fixture schedule editor, where you can copy from an existing schedule table, place a new schedule table, and keep the linked table in sync.
commands.LFSOPEN: Alias for LFS. Opens the lighting fixture schedule editor palette.
commands.LFSPULL: Exports selected lighting fixture schedule table data to T24LightingFixtureSchedule.sync.json in the active DWG folder.
commands.LFSPUSH: Loads T24LightingFixtureSchedule.sync.json from the active DWG folder and applies it to a selected lighting fixture schedule table.
commands.LIGHTPLANSCAN: Scans configured room-boundary polylines and light fixture blocks, then exports ACIESLightingPlan.snapshot.json beside the active drawing.
commands.LIGHTPLANAPPLY: Applies reviewed ACIES lighting fixture tags from ACIESLightingPlan.instructions.json and updates prior generated tags without duplication.
